texto: He does not despise real woods because he has read of enchanted woods
autor: the reading makes all real woods a little enchanted.
explicacao: Citação de the reading makes all real woods a little enchanted. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “He does not despise real woods because he has read of enchanted woods” articula reflexao, c-s-lewis, woods em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
